title: allophylus hispidus
intro: Allophylus hispidus, also known as the rough-leaved allophyllus or black pepper tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa and Asia, belonging to the family Sapindaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of allophylus hispidus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from pain and swelling. Allophylus hispidus can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots are often used in herbal remedies.
